description: Use this API to build a bus subsystem one bus at a time. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = bsyso(sid, busnum)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid bus subsystem id. valid bus subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: busnum
parameters.description: Bus number to add to subsystem. (input).

error_codes.description: Bus subsystem contains other elements, not just buses.
